seoTitle: Vectis vs Venus Bay — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Vectis and Venus Bay. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Vectis vs Venus Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Vectis and Venus Bay.
heading: Vectis vs Venus Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Vectis, Victoria and Venus Bay, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Venus Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Vectis (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Vectis or Venus Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Vectis has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Venus Bay scores 20/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Vectis scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Venus Bay scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Vectis or Venus Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Venus Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
